capture_metadata.notes: 继续补齐 heater-follow-up 在 apiyi_ch 上的首轮正式真实 capture。

diagnostics.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Feed Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-heater-multi-action-001","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","confidence":0.85,"summary":"针对选中的加热器单元(heater-1)及其进料流(feed-1)，基于两条错误诊断生成候选修复提案：补全进料流的流量规格缺失，以及补全加热器出口温度控制的目标参数。","answers":[{"text":"检测到2个错误：进料流'Cold Feed'缺少流量规格，加热器'Feed Heater'配置了出口温度控制但缺少目标温度值。已生成两条候选编辑分别补全这些缺失参数。","citations":["diag-1","diag-2","flowdoc-stream-1","flowdoc-unit-1"]}],"issues":[{"code":"STREAM_SPEC_MISSING","message":"Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.","severity":"error","target_type":"stream","target_id":"feed-1","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1"]},{"code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE","message":"Feed Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.","severity":"error","target_type":"unit","target_id":"heater-1","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"action_type":"candidate_edit","title":"补全进料流流量规格","target":{"type":"stream","id":"feed-1","name":"Cold Feed"},"rationale":"诊断STREAM_SPEC_MISSING指出进料流缺少流量规格。当前流仅有温度和压力规格，需添加流量参数以完成物料平衡计算。使用spec_placeholders添加流量规格占位，待用户确认具体数值。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":[{"field":"mass_flow_kg_hr","description":"质量流量，单位kg/h，需根据工艺要求填写"}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-1"]},{"action_type":"candidate_edit","title":"补全加热器出口温度目标值","target":{"type":"unit","id":"heater-1","name":"Feed Heater"},"rationale":"诊断UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE指出加热器配置为outlet_temperature控制模式但缺少目标温度。需在config中添加outlet_temperature_target_c参数，与现有control_mode形成完整控制回路。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"config.outlet_temperature_target_c":{"value":null,"description":"出口目标温度，单位℃，需根据下游工艺要求设定"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-1"]}],"citations":["diag-1","diag-2","flowdoc-stream-1","flowdoc-unit-1"],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对选中的加热器单元(heater-1)及其进料流(feed-1)，基于两条错误诊断生成候选修复提案：补全进料流的流量规格缺失，以及补全加热器出口温度控制的目标参数。

answers.text: 检测到2个错误：进料流'Cold Feed'缺少流量规格，加热器'Feed Heater'配置了出口温度控制但缺少目标温度值。已生成两条候选编辑分别补全这些缺失参数。

issues.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Feed Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.

proposed_actions.title: 补全进料流流量规格
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断STREAM_SPEC_MISSING指出进料流缺少流量规格。当前流仅有温度和压力规格，需添加流量参数以完成物料平衡计算。使用spec_placeholders添加流量规格占位，待用户确认具体数值。

proposed_actions.title: 补全加热器出口温度目标值
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE指出加热器配置为outlet_temperature控制模式但缺少目标温度。需在config中添加outlet_temperature_target_c参数，与现有control_mode形成完整控制回路。
